description_long: This is a large, stately brick house set within a walled property, featuring a circular driveway at the front and a detached garage connected by a covered walkway. The main building has two prominent stories with a dark, multi-gabled roof and numerous symmetrically arranged windows. The grounds are landscaped with mature trees lining the perimeter and a manicured lawn, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, a tennis court, and a patio area. The front entrance is grand, with a double-door entryway, steps, and a small portico supported by columns. The property is enclosed by a white fence with a gated driveway entrance. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A large, elegant brick house with a multi-gabled roof, circular driveway, detached garage, and landscaped grounds featuring a pool and tennis court, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, main entrance with columns, and the detached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard amenities, including the swimming pool, tennis court, and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, tennis court, and the back facade with large windows and patio doors.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, garage, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with steps, small portico, and columns
